boundary.note: This pack proves the no-auth browser smoke and orchestrated CDD envelope shape. It does not replace live upstream smoke or prove current ACRA/GeBIZ source state.

artifacts.role: structured dossier export with manifest, provenance, freshness, gaps, limits, source-use warnings, and orchestration trace
browser screenshot of the successful smoke flow

provenance.coverage: Entity identity fixture for browser smoke coverage.

gaps.message: No GeBIZ tender award records are returned by the smoke fixture.

limits.message: The browser smoke fixture covers public registry surfaces only; it does not assert directors, shareholders, or beneficial ownership.

stages.detail: Fixture gateway resolved DBS BANK to DBS BANK LTD / 03591300B through the orchestrator identity gate.
stages.label: ACRA identity lookup

stages.detail: Fixture SSIC evidence classified the entity as finance, so no specialist BCA, BOA, CEA, HSA, or HLB sector module was justified.
stages.label: Sector inference

stages.detail: ACRA and GeBIZ fixture modules ran; ACRA matched and GeBIZ returned an explicit no-match gap.
stages.label: Official module enrichment

stages.detail: Fixture web and people discovery were included as supplemental analyst-review evidence; external provider checks remain represented as supplemental tools.
stages.label: Supplemental review

stages.detail: Fixture memo produced cited analyst-review findings from the returned dossier evidence.
stages.label: AI memo

limits: Fixture orchestrator response mirrors the production CDD flow shape.

reportManifest.note: The PDF also includes the report manifest section generated by the web export path.
